subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In matters that pertain to the improvement of one's qualities and the moderation of one's character, or such things as will elevate one to lofty and exalted stations, people have free will
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان در اموریکه راجع بتحسین صفات و تعدیل اخلاق است و سبب علو و صعود بمقامات عالیهٴ
subcodes.subjects: @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @free will and predestination; fate, @education and the development of capacity, @spiritual transformation
